title: Pack owner address and extra metadata in same storage slot, use adjacent slot for approval
trigger_patterns: token owner plus metadata in one slot
description: A single storage slot holds owner(160 bits) in lower bits and extraData(96 bits) in upper bits. The approved address lives at add(1, ownershipSlot) — no keccak256 needed, just increment. Slot derived as add(id, add(id, keccak256(id, seed))) so adjacent token IDs have nearby (but not colliding) slots, friendly to EVM storage access patterns.
when_to_apply: NFT contracts needing per-token metadata alongside ownership — saves 2 slot derivations per token operation
when_not_to_apply: Contracts where extraData changes independently of ownership at high frequency (each write is still a cold SSTORE)
